phase10.objective: Deterministic exact semantic composition baseline and pre-recurrent Stage 5-7 bridge
implemented: exact semantic-definition instantiation and closure-proof propagation
grounded slot-to-CSIR binding without grammar-role hardcoding
partial graph and unresolved frontier preservation
canonical attractor stabilization preserving close alternatives
not_claimed: automatic lowering of incomplete Phase-9 English source programs

phase11.objective: Epistemic admission, conversational memory, discourse/coreference, correction and grounded query
implemented: attributed-only preservation for unrelated third-party claims
bounded session belief memory with CAS commit
open-question, clarification, common-ground and discourse-anchor state
bounded CSIR query binding and minimal proof-path retrieval
not_claimed: global truth promotion from user assertions
durable restart-persistent world belief without an injected authorized durable commit coordinator

prerequisite_bug_fixes: ClaimRecord permits equal source/reported context values while preserving distinct roles
ClaimGrounding permits equal source/reported context values
GroundingCandidateProvider can represent scope-local non-durable anchored referents
truth-query absence remains unknown rather than false
session correction targeting preserves temporal recency rather than lexical ref ordering
generic VM variable-variable unification uses typed substitution instead of asymmetric kernel unification
